hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Sixth implementation sprint completed. YAML-only infra sprint (no Go code) delivered in 10m with all gates passing. Process adapts to non-code sprints without modification.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: Gates passed on first run. helm lint and helm template added as additional gates for this sprint — caught template rendering issues before commit. Standard Go gates (build, lint, test, coverage) confirmed no regressions from YAML-only changes.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 H7 audit items passed: templates reference only values.yaml (no magic strings), RBAC uses least privilege, helm lint/template run as gates, NOTES.txt provides actionable post-install steps, Helm chart has clear done-state verification steps.

hypotheses.name: Flowstate works for greenfield projects
hypotheses.evidence: Seventh sprint (including sprint 0) on greenfield project. First infra-only sprint — Helm chart and raw manifests delivered within LOC estimate (642 actual vs 500-800 estimated).

hypotheses.name: Skills generalize across languages
hypotheses.evidence: All 5 audited instructions are infrastructure-agnostic: interface communication, test mirroring, least privilege, user feedback, acceptance criteria. Applied to Helm/YAML without adaptation.
